title: Team - Spring is officially upon us. This transition marks a great victory.
excerpt: Armies in history have a name for the Eastern European Winter. They call him “General Winter.” He defeated Napoleon. He defeated the Ottomans. He defeated Hitler. He did not defeat us. He has had four tries...
